subject: fix(mobile): hide header and platform strip when bottom sheet is open
body:
With the bottom sheet at 50vh, the header (~44px), ContextBar, and
platform info strip (~36px) consumed ~120px of the remaining space,
leaving minimal room for the canvas. Now when the sheet opens, the
header and platform strip hide entirely, giving the canvas maximum
vertical space while editing.

Tags: mobile, ux, layout, bottom-sheet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-layout
Semver: patch
